title: • Provides historical & philosophical grounding.
content:
• Provides historical & philosophical grounding.
• Naturally leads into political rhetoric & literary power structures.

📌 Version 4.4: Final Questions Before Lock-In
1. Do we want to add additional class-wide XP rewards (e.g., entire class reaches Level 10 = Movie Bonus Week)?
2. Should students be able to “respec” their character mid-semester (switch archetypes)?
3. Do we want to give students an option to propose their own Final Research Project alternative (individually approved)?
4. Would we like a special in-class event near the end of the semester (a debate, tournament, or narrative-driven team activity)?

🚀 If this is finalized, we lock Version 4.4 and move to syllabus & Canvas setup!

📌 Version 4.5 – RPG Fully Integrated, Expanded Unlockables, Mastery Exam Levels, Historical Anchor Finalization, and Party-Based XP System


🚀 Incorporating the RPG mechanics into every aspect of the class while refining grading structures, peer review, mastery exams, and class-wide achievements.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 31 (chunk 31/555)
